title.rendered: Turn Anonymous Website Visitors into Prospects with Nowspeed Lead Velocity

content.rendered:
Your website has the potential to be a goldmine for leads. Yet, an astounding 98% of website visitors leave without converting. Most businesses lose these opportunities simply because they don’t know who these visitors are or how to engage them effectively.

Nowspeed is turning this frustrating dynamic on its head:

  • With our expert lead nurture campaigns, you can identify as many as 30-50% of your website visitors and nurture them into qualified leads
  • Rest assured every lead you identify has already given permission to be marketed to, ensuring GDPR and CCPA compliance.

How Does the Technology Work?

Our groundbreaking technology works with trusted data providers to identify website visitors through cookies, matching them with individuals who have explicitly consented to marketing communications. While other tools focus only on visitor identification, our technology ensures marketing compliance by connecting you with pre-verified, permission-based leads.

By identifying 30-50% of your website traffic, Nowspeed introduces a wealth of new opportunities to engage potential customers. But identification is just the beginning. Nowspeed takes it further with customized, multi-touch lead nurture campaigns that drive results.

How Does the Technology and Lead Nurturing Work Together?

The process is seamless and powerful:

  • Add the Tag to Your Website: A simple code snippet enables real-time identification of visitors who’ve provided marketing permission.
  • Identify and Segment Visitors: Our technology captures visitor details that Nowspeed uses to create targeted segments for personalized marketing.
  • Launch Multi-Touch Lead Nurture Campaigns: Nowspeed develops tailored campaigns to engage these leads across email, Google Ads, and social media platforms, ensuring your brand stays top-of-mind.

Why Traditional Marketing Falls Short

Most digital marketing strategies rely on capturing leads through form fills. However, only 1-2% of website visitors typically convert this way. This leaves most of your traffic unengaged and untapped. Traditional strategies also struggle to maintain compliance with evolving data privacy regulations, putting businesses at risk.

With Nowspeed’s Lead Velocity nurture campaigns, you are not just identifying more visitors—you are engaging them with permission-based marketing strategies that comply with GDPR and CCPA. This means you can market confidently while building trust with your audience.

The Benefits of Nowspeed’s Lead Velocity Nurture Campaigns

1. Permission-Based Identification

Every identified visitor has given explicit consent to be marketed to, ensuring your campaigns are ethical and compliant.

2. Multi-Touch Email Campaigns

Nowspeed creates customized email sequences that nurture leads through every stage of the buyer’s journey. From welcome emails to case studies and product demos, these campaigns are designed to educate, engage, and convert.

3. Google Remarketing Campaigns

Leverage targeted ads to re-engage visitors who have already interacted with your website. These ads are strategically placed to keep your brand top-of-mind, driving leads back to your site for further engagement.

4. Social Media Outreach Campaigns

Extend your reach with personalized social media campaigns. Platforms like LinkedIn and Facebook allow you to connect directly with identified leads, fostering deeper relationships and increasing conversion rates.

5. Accelerated Sales Opportunities

Identified leads can be passed directly to your Business Development Representatives (BDRs) for timely follow-up, ensuring no opportunity is missed.

How Nowspeed Turns Visitors into Customers

At Nowspeed, we go beyond mere technology implementation to deliver measurable results. Here is how we transform identified visitors into paying customers:

  • Tailored Email Nurture Campaigns: Personalized email series are designed to guide leads through their journey, from initial engagement to final conversion. Emails include valuable content such as whitepapers, case studies, webinars, and product demos.
  • Strategic Remarketing Ads: Our Google Ads campaigns focus on re-engaging visitors based on their behaviors and interests. With our technology, we can target these ads more precisely, increasing their effectiveness.
  • Social Media Engagement: Nowspeed crafts targeted campaigns on platforms like LinkedIn to connect with high-value leads. This outreach complements email and ad campaigns, creating a cohesive multi-channel experience.
  • Direct Sales Support: Identified leads are segmented and passed to your sales team with detailed insights, enabling more effective and timely follow-ups.

Proven ROI with Compliance and Confidence

Our technology excels in identifying website visitors while prioritizing data responsibility. By verifying that each lead has provided explicit consent, your marketing complies with GDPR, CCPA, and other data privacy regulations, enhancing audience trust and protecting your business from legal risks.

At just $0.50 per identified visitor, the cost is minimal compared to the potential ROI. When combined with Nowspeed’s expertly crafted campaigns, you’ll see higher engagement rates, increased lead quality, and ultimately, more sales.

Getting Started with Nowspeed’s Lead Velocity Campaign

Launching lead nurture campaigns is fast and straightforward:

  1. Schedule a Consultation: Contact Nowspeed to discuss your goals and learn how our tech can fit into your marketing strategy.
  2. Add the Tag to Your Website: We’ll guide you through the simple implementation process.
  3. Launch Multi-Channel Campaigns: Nowspeed’s team will create and execute customized campaigns across email, ads, and social media.

Claim Your 500 Free Leads Today

To help you experience the power of our lead nurture campaigns, we are offering 500 free leads for a limited time. This is your chance to see how permission-based marketing can transform your strategy and drive tangible results.

Don’t wait—take the first step toward smarter, more compliant marketing today. Contact Nowspeed to claim your free leads and get started.

Claim Your Free Leads Now
